subject: before photo
body:
HAPPY BIRTHDAY!

I wish I was closer, so I could see you ... I really do miss you

home phone:    +61 2 9960.2637

cell:   61 0? 488.488.699     -- not sure about the zero --

(I'm just running out for 45 minutes)

I'll send the after shot when I get back

Love,
Kelly
